metadata.name: MDE Onboarding Policy Baseline
metadata.description: Recommended Group Policy and Intune configuration settings for Microsoft Defender for Endpoint onboarding, sensor configuration, and operational prerequisites.
metadata.author: antyg

references.title: Configure MDE endpoints using Group Policy

onboarding.description: Core onboarding settings required for SENSE service registration and cloud communication.

settings.name: OnboardingInfo
settings.description: Onboarding blob containing workspace ID, workspace key, and region. Obtained from Security Center > Settings > Endpoints > Onboarding.
settings.gpoPath: Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > Windows Components > Microsoft Defender Antivirus > MDE Onboarding
settings.notes: Tenant-specific. Do not share across tenants. Regenerate if compromised.

settings.name: OnboardingState
settings.description: Indicates the device is configured for onboarding. Set automatically by the onboarding package.
settings.notes: Read-only indicator. Value 1 = onboarded. Value 0 = not onboarded.

sensorConfiguration.description: SENSE service operational settings controlling telemetry, sample submission, and diagnostic data.

settings.name: SampleSharing
settings.description: Controls whether file samples are automatically submitted to Microsoft for analysis.
settings.gpoPath: Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > Windows Components > Microsoft Defender Antivirus > MAPS > Send file samples when further analysis is required
settings.notes: Value 1 (safe samples) is the recommended baseline for most organisations.

settings.name: CloudProtectionLevel
settings.description: Controls the aggressiveness of cloud-delivered protection blocking decisions.
settings.gpoPath: Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > Windows Components > Microsoft Defender Antivirus > MAPS > Configure the 'Block at First Sight' feature
settings.notes: Advanced membership (2) enables Block at First Sight and provides richer telemetry.

settings.name: CloudBlockTimeout
settings.description: Extended timeout for cloud-delivered protection verdicts before allowing execution.
settings.gpoPath: Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > Windows Components > Microsoft Defender Antivirus > MAPS > Configure extended cloud check
settings.notes: Maximum 50 seconds. Total timeout = default 10s + extended value. Recommended: 50 (maximum).

settings.name: DiagnosticDataLevel
settings.description: Windows diagnostic data level required for MDE telemetry.
settings.gpoPath: Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > Windows Components > Data Collection and Preview Builds > Allow Diagnostic Data
settings.notes: MDE requires at minimum level 1 (Required). Level 2 provides richer data for Advanced Hunting.

networkPrerequisites.description: Network endpoints that must be reachable for MDE sensor communication. Australian region.

endpoints.notes: Required if SmartScreen or Network Protection is enabled.
CRL checks use HTTP (port 80), not HTTPS.

networkPrerequisites.notes: This is a subset of endpoints for the Australian region. See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/defender-endpoint/configure-environment for the complete list including global endpoints.

servicePrerequisites.description: Windows services required for MDE operation.

services.name: SENSE
services.displayName: Windows Defender Advanced Threat Protection Service
services.notes: Core MDE sensor service. Must be running for onboarding and telemetry.

services.name: WinDefend
services.notes: Required for real-time protection and Attack Surface Reduction rules.
